title: Mind-wandering as spontaneous thought: a dynamic framework.

assets.abstract: Most research on mind-wandering has characterized it as a mental state with contents that are task unrelated or stimulus independent. However, the dynamics of mind-wandering - how mental states change over time - have remained largely neglected. Here, we introduce a dynamic framework for understanding mind-wandering and its relationship to the recruitment of large-scale brain networks. We propose that mind-wandering is best understood as a member of a family of spontaneous-thought phenomena that

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.
